summary: Full regression test completed for MDM Mapping Tool after 7 features shipped. All 29 backend API tests passed. All 10+ frontend pages tested successfully including Dashboard, Ingestion Wizard, Keyword Rules, Test Sandbox, Review Workbench, Standards, Synonyms, Sessions, Batches, Quick Upload, and Audit Log.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Dialog components missing aria-describedby for accessibility compliance
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full regression passed. All 10 sidebar navigation links work. Dashboard shows KPI cards, donut chart, bar chart, confidence histogram, batch performance table. Ingestion Wizard shows 3 cards (Upload File, Connect Database, Create Table Manually) after session creation. Keyword Rules CRUD works with 13 seeded rules. Test Sandbox shows 4-step pipeline with winner highlighting. Review Workbench has AI Match, Retry Match, Export buttons with filters including AI match type. Dark mode toggle works and persists. Standards (67) and Synonyms (365+) CRUD work. Sessions, Batches, Quick Upload, Audit Log all functional.
